name: BASF SE
lede: BASF runs five centers across five Indian cities. Mumbai, Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad and Mangaluru, covering GBS, R&D and IT, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BASF office in India. We map five, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BASF SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BASF runs 5 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Mumbai, Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad, Mangaluru), covering GBS, R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: BASF's India footprint covers Mumbai, Chennai, Thane, Hyderabad and Mangaluru, spanning GBS, R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 73 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does BASF operate in India?
faq.a: BASF operates 5 active centers in India. Six are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BASF have centers in?
faq.a: BASF's India footprint includes Mumbai and 4 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does BASF run in India?
faq.a: BASF runs GBS and 2 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BASF's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for BASF's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BASF's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at BASF's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
